children.text: the number equal to the sum of the quotients obtained under subparagraph (A) and paragraph (8)(A) for all eligible counties.

children.label: i
children.text: the number of acres of Federal land described in paragraph (7)(A) in each eligible county; by

children.label: ii
children.text: the total number acres of Federal land in all eligible counties in all eligible States; and1So in original. Probably should be preceded by “of”.1

children.label: i
children.text: the amount equal to the average of the 3 highest 25-percent payments and safety net payments made to each eligible State for each eligible county during the eligibility period; by

children.label: ii

children.heading: County payment
children.label: 3 County payment
children.text: The term “county payment” means the payment for an eligible county calculated under .section 7111(b) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: contains Federal land (as defined in paragraph (7)); and

children.label: B
children.text: elects to receive a share of the State payment or the county payment under .section 7112(b) of this title

children.heading: Eligibility period
children.label: 5 Eligibility period
children.text: The term “eligibility period” means fiscal year 1986 through fiscal year 1999.

children.heading: Eligible State
children.label: 6 Eligible State
children.text: The term “eligible State” means a State or territory of the United States that received a 25-percent payment for 1 or more fiscal years of the eligibility period.

children.label: A
children.text: land within the National Forest System, as defined in exclusive of the National Grasslands and land utilization projects designated as National Grasslands administered pursuant to the Act of (2); andsection 1609(a) of this title7 U.S.C. 1010–101July 22, 1937

children.label: B
children.text: such portions of the revested Oregon and California Railroad and reconveyed Coos Bay Wagon Road grant land as are or may hereafter come under the jurisdiction of the Department of the Interior, which have heretofore or may hereafter be classified as timberlands, and power-site land valuable for timber, that shall be managed, except as provided in the former (; ), for permanent forest production.section 3 of the Act of August 28, 193750 Stat. 87543 U.S.C. 1181c

children.label: i
children.text: the 50-percent base share for the eligible county; by

children.label: ii
children.text: the income adjustment for the eligible county; by

children.label: B
children.text: the number equal to the sum of the quotients obtained under subparagraph (A) and paragraph (1)(A) for all eligible counties.

children.label: i
children.text: the number of acres of Federal land described in paragraph (7)(B) in each eligible county; by

children.label: ii
children.text: the total number acres of Federal land in all eligible counties in all eligible States; and1

children.label: i
children.text: the amount equal to the average of the 3 highest 50-percent payments made to each eligible county during the eligibility period; by

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount equal to the sum of the amounts calculated under clause (i) and paragraph (2)(B)(i) for all eligible counties in all eligible States during the eligibility period.

children.heading: 50-percent payment
children.label: 10 50-percent payment
children.text: The term “50-percent payment” means the payment that is the sum of the 50-percent share otherwise paid to a county pursuant to title II of the Act of (chapter 876; ; ), and the payment made to a county pursuant to the Act of (chapter 144; ; et seq.) .August 28, 1937May 24, 193950 Stat. 87543 U.S.C. 1181f253 Stat. 75343 U.S.C. 1181f–12See References in Text note below.2

children.label: A
children.text: $500,000,000 for fiscal year 2008;

children.label: B
children.text: for each of fiscal years 2009 through 2011, the amount that is equal to 90 percent of the full funding amount for the preceding fiscal year;

children.label: C
children.text: for fiscal year 2012 through fiscal year 2015, the amount that is equal to 95 percent of the full funding amount for the preceding fiscal year;

children.label: D
children.text: for fiscal year 2017, the amount that is equal to 95 percent of the full funding amount for fiscal year 2015;

children.label: E
children.text: for each of fiscal years 2018 through 2020, the amount that is equal to 95 percent of the full funding amount for the preceding fiscal year; and

children.label: F
children.text: for fiscal year 2021 and each fiscal year thereafter, the amount that is equal to the full funding amount for fiscal year 2017.

children.label: A
children.text: the per capita personal income for each eligible county; by

children.label: B
children.text: the median per capita personal income of all eligible counties.

children.heading: Per capita personal income
children.label: 13 Per capita personal income
children.text: The term “per capita personal income” means the most recent per capita personal income data, as determined by the Bureau of Economic Analysis.

children.heading: Safety net payments
children.label: 14 Safety net payments
children.text: The term “safety net payments” means the special payment amounts paid to States and counties required by section 13982 or 13983 of the Omnibus Budget Reconciliation Act of 1993 (; note; note).2Public Law 103–6616 U.S.C. 50043 U.S.C. 1181f

children.label: A
children.text: the Secretary of Agriculture or the designee of the Secretary of Agriculture with respect to the Federal land described in paragraph (7)(A); and

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary of the Interior or the designee of the Secretary of the Interior with respect to the Federal land described in paragraph (7)(B).

children.heading: State payment
children.label: 16 State payment
children.text: The term “State payment” means the payment for an eligible State calculated under .section 7111(a) of this title

children.heading: 25-percent payment
children.label: 17 25-percent payment
children.text: The term “25-percent payment” means the payment to States required by the sixth paragraph under the heading of “FOREST SERVICE” in the Act of (; ), and (; ).May 23, 190835 Stat. 26016 U.S.C. 500section 13 of the Act of March 1, 191136 Stat. 96316 U.S.C. 500
